summary: Iteration 21: Real file hosting via Emergent Object Storage testing complete. All 18 tests passed. Deploy uploads files to object storage, preview endpoints serve files with correct MIME types (text/html, text/css, application/javascript). Deployment CRUD operations working. All regression tests passed.
passed_tests: POST /api/deploy/{project_id} - uploads files to object storage, returns real preview URL with files_uploaded count
POST /api/deploy/{project_id} - generates index.html automatically if not present in project files
POST /api/deploy/{project_id} - requires verified email (403 for unverified users)
GET /api/preview/{deployment_id}/index.html - serves HTML with text/html content type
GET /api/preview/{deployment_id}/style.css - serves CSS with text/css content type
GET /api/preview/{deployment_id}/app.js - serves JS with application/javascript content type
GET /api/deployments/{id} - returns deployment details with status=deployed
DELETE /api/deployments/{id} - deletes deployment and resets project status to draft
Regression: GET /api/health - health check returns healthy status
Regression: POST /api/auth/login - user login returns JWT tokens
Regression: POST /api/projects - works for verified user
critical_code_review_comments: Object storage integration working correctly - files uploaded to cursorcode/deployments/{deployment_id}/ paths
Preview endpoint is public (no auth required) - correct for static file serving
MIME types correctly mapped: html->text/html, css->text/css, js->application/javascript
Deploy logs show upload progress with file counts
Generated index.html has cybersecurity-themed dark design with file links
Deployment delete correctly resets project status to 'draft'
PUT /api/projects/{id}/files expects files dict directly in body (not wrapped in {files: ...})
seed_data_creation: Created test projects with TEST_ prefix for each test class, cleaned up after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 21 verified real file hosting via Emergent Object Storage. Deploy uploads files to storage, preview serves them with correct MIME types. MOCKED: JengaHQ payment (demo mode), AI generation (demo mode). Object storage is REAL (not mocked) - EMERGENT_LLM_KEY is set. PUT /api/projects/{id}/files expects files dict directly in body, not wrapped.

mocked_features.AI generation: Demo mode when XAI_API_KEY not set

deployment_storage_verification.auto_index_generation: Yes - generates index.html with dark theme if not present
